name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: rule IDs must match the kebab-case pattern ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*(/[a-z][a-z0-9-]*)?$
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: Bad_Id
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing 2>err.txt; grep -q 'must match kebab-case pattern' err.txt && echo kebab_enforced 1>&2
